{{Infobox technique
| name = Nightworm Venom
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Nightworm Venom]] technique eats into armor and corrupts it.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Nightworm Venom]] is a technique from [[Mercy]]'s third page.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Nightworm Venom]] is a [[Striker technique]] used by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Nightworm Venom]] is a technique used to spray venom.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
